name: small-talk
description: Engaging in small-talk or discussing topics apart from negotiation to build rapport

name: empathy
description: Showing empathetic behavior towards the partner

name: promote-coordination
description: Making concessions or expressing desire to coordinate/find a deal

name: no-need
description: Implying that a particular item is not required based on personal context

name: elicit-pref
description: Inquiring about or attempting to gather the partner's preferences

name: undervalue-partner
description: Undermining the needs of the partner

name: vouch-fairness
description: Encouraging fairness in the deal to benefit self

name: self-need
description: Implying that a particular item is needed for personal use

name: other-need
description: Implying that a particular item is needed for someone else
